name: Active X Jacket
description:
The ActiveX jacket is designed for warmth and protection during intense activity. Thanks to its 4-way stretch construction and 10K waterproof softshell fabric, the ActiveX delivers protection without sacrificing mobility. It's form fitting hood is designed to be worn while running and can fit under a helmet. Four deep inner and outside pockets ensure that all your valuables stay in place.

Fabric: TerraX | 3-layer softshell | 10K waterproof fabric
Composition: 88% PES, 7% EA, 5% PUE
Cut: regular
Customisation: all of its surface can be customised
Collar: choose between a straight collar or hood
Zipper: choose between full zipper and half zipper
Pockets: two extra wide external pockets with zipper | two high-capacity internal pockets
Other Features: adjustable cuffs | form fitting hood | storm flap on main zipper
